title: 10pc Insulated Test Lead Cable with Alligator Clips Colorful Set - 20 Inch
description:
Each 20" test lead in this 10 pack has two crimped, insulated 1.5" alligator clips with springs for a safe, secure hold. The leads feature red, green, black, white, and yellow 22 gauge insulation to prevent shorting or a dangerous shock. These test leads with alligator clips are perfect for electronics, circuits, automotive, batteries, and electrical projects. Be sure to have these around the next time you need safe and reliable assistance for an electrical project.

Each 20" test lead in this 10 pack has two crimped, insulated 1.5" alligator clips with springs for a safe, secure hold. The leads feature red, green, black, white, and yellow 22 gauge insulation to prevent shorting or a dangerous shock.

Key Features

  • Lead Length: 19 1/2
  • Alligator Clip Length: 1 1/2
  • Each Testing Lead Has 2 Alligator Clips
  • Alligator Clips are Crimped
  • 22 Gauge Protective Insulation

Product Specifications

  • MPN: aUTAC20-565-581
  • UPC: 883041270683
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: 10pc
